# TrustField primary strategic bet (2026–2027)

**Status:** Locked for TrustField only (external to Noetfield repo)  
**Effective:** 2026-05-29  
**Decision:** **A — Governance-first**

## What this means

| Lane | Priority | Notes |
|------|----------|--------|
| **Trust Brief, bank/Copilot pilots, E-23 vendor posture** | **P0 (2026)** | TrustField corporate revenue |
| **CDB Phase 1 adjacency (partner-led)** | **P1 (2026)** | TrustField partnerships |
| **VIRLUX licensed payments** | **P1 optional (2027)** | [../virlux/fintech.md](../virlux/fintech.md) — separate repo |
| **Noetfield product engineering** | **Separate** | Noetfield repo/chat only — not TrustField implementation |

**Related:** [canada-fintech-2026-2027.md](./canada-fintech-2026-2027.md) · [corporate-tracker.md](./corporate-tracker.md)
